description_long: This is a brown glass beer bottle with a green and white neck label and a large, colorful main label featuring a central crest, decorative hops, and blue floral elements. The main label is oval-shaped and bordered in gold, with detailed text and a prominent illustration. The bottle is capped with a metallic crown cap, which is shown removed and placed beside the bottle. The surface of the bottle is matte and slightly textured, with no visible condensation. The back of the bottle displays a barcode and additional product information, while the neck label is simple and bold. The overall design is traditional, evoking a classic European beer aesthetic.
description: A brown glass beer bottle with a colorful, detailed label and a metallic crown cap, featuring traditional European design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with crest, hops, and blue floral graphics, as well as the green and white neck label and the crown cap placed beside the bottle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the edge of the main label, the barcode, and the curvature of the bottle, with the cap visible below.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bottle, barcode, and the less-decorated side of the label, with the cap to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the label's edge, neck label, and the bottle's brown glass surface, with the cap below.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a central crest with decorative hops and blue floral motifs, bordered in gold, and uses a mix of serif and sans-serif fonts. The design is traditional and colorful, with a green and white neck label and detailed product information on the back.
